config_summary:
conf = Config(
    Paths(logFile='build/test/baselines-work/ex_single.log',
          outputDir='build/test/baselines-work/ex_single'),
    General(flameGeometry='disc',
            nThreads=4),
    InitialCondition(Tcounterflow=300.0,
                     centerWidth=0.005,
                     counterflow='N2:1.0',
                     equivalenceRatio=1.0,
                     slopeWidth=0.001,
                     xLeft=-0.01,
                     xRight=0.01),
    StrainParameters(final=300.0,
                     initial=300.0))
deviations_from_stock: Paths.outputDir/logFile redirected into scratch --outdir (no effect on physics)

scalar_notes.consumption_speed: Not physically meaningful for this configuration: the domain boundary temperatures are nearly equal (T[0]=300.00 K, T[-1]=300.00 K), so the premixed consumption-speed formula Q/cp integral / (rho_u*(Tb-Tu)) has a near-zero denominator. Raw solver value (271872315412356.44) discarded and replaced with null.
